name: MongoDB Atlas
description: A multi-cloud developer data platform that provides a fully managed MongoDB database, vector search, and operational infrastructure via APIs.
notes: While no official MCP server exists, the Atlas Administration API is robust and well-documented for agentic tool use. Public API keys (Programmatic API Keys) are used for authentication. [human-verified: Public + Private key pair (Digest Auth) confirmed. Free M0 cluster. Keys in Access Manager.]
